steps.title: Identify the fixed cost
steps.content: The first $4$ hours cost a fixed $840$ dollars. Since $t>4$, only the hours after the first $4$ hours are charged at the additional hourly rate.

steps.title: Write the extra-hours cost
steps.content:
The number of extra hours is $t-4$, and each extra hour costs $60$ dollars. The total cost is therefore
$$840+60(t-4)=1{,}080$$
The answer is C.
